report.summary: Community growth cycle v9 (evening): Drafted 5 social posts (Solana SDP launch breaking thread, Day 47 Extreme Fear divergence tweet, new guides drop, CLARITY Act countdown, SDP impact poll), newsletter v19 section for Thu Mar 27, Discord/TG evening update, and created 2 branded SVG social cards (Solana SDP Launch with Mastercard/Western Union/Worldpay + Day 47 Fear-Price Divergence). Market: BTC $71,043 (+4% relief rally from $68,302), ETH +5.16%, F&G 11 (Day 47 of consecutive Extreme Fear — longest since FTX), Solana Developer Platform launched TODAY with Mastercard/Western Union/Worldpay, Senate Banking Committee reviewing CLARITY Act draft this week, Spot BTC ETFs $1.3B March inflows ($128B AUM), stablecoin supply $304B ATH, SOL stablecoin supply $15.7B ATH, 738 published pages with 2 in queue.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #87: Solana Developer Platform Launch Thread (4 parts) — 'Solana just launched the Solana Developer Platform (SDP). Mastercard. Western Union. Worldpay. Not a testnet. Not a pilot. A production enterprise toolkit.' Part 2: SDP modules — issuance (tokenized deposits, stablecoins, RWAs), payments (fiat + stablecoin flows), trading (Q4 2026). Part 3: Partner details — Mastercard stablecoin settlement, Western Union cross-border payments, Worldpay merchant settlement, Elliptic compliance, 20+ infra partners. Part 4: SOL March milestones — SEC commodity, Walmart OnePay, $15.7B stablecoin ATH, $650B monthly tx, enterprise platform. Link to solana-ecosystem guide. (Schedule Tue Mar 24 9PM — TODAY, breaking news)

Tweet #88: Day 47 Extreme Fear + BTC $71K — 'Day 47 of Extreme Fear. F&G still at 11. And BTC is holding $71K after a 4% bounce from $68,302. Widest sentiment-price divergence since November 2022. Spot BTC ETFs: $1.3B March inflows, $128B AUM. Somebody's accumulating.' Link to fear-greed-timeline tool. (Schedule Wed Mar 25 8AM)

Tweet #89: New Guides Drop — Tax-Loss Harvesting 2026 (IRS wash sale exemption, $3K/year advantage, software comparison) + Cold Storage & Seed Phrase Security (Ledger vs Trezor vs Coldcard vs Foundation Passport, multi-sig). April 15 tax deadline 3 weeks out. Link to /learn. (Schedule Wed Mar 25 12PM)

Tweet #90: CLARITY Act Week Countdown — Senate Banking Committee reviewing draft language RIGHT NOW. Yield framework: passive stablecoin yield banned, activity rewards preserved. Tillis + Alsobrooks confirmed agreement. Markup targeting late April. If it dies in committee, crypto regulation resets 2+ years. Link to crypto-regulations-2026. (Schedule Thu Mar 26 10AM)

Tweet #91: Engagement Poll — Solana SDP impact: which use case moves the most volume first? Stablecoin settlement (Mastercard) / Cross-border payments (Western Union) / Merchant tokenized assets (Worldpay) / All three converge by Q4. (Schedule Thu Mar 26 6PM)

Newsletter v19 section (for weekly digest Thu Mar 27): Subject 'Mastercard Is Building on Solana. Here's What That Actually Means.' — Market pulse (BTC $71,043 Day 47 fear, $1.3B ETF inflows), Solana SDP deep-dive (Mastercard/Western Union/Worldpay, issuance + payments modules, 20+ partners), CLARITY Act update (Senate review this week, yield compromise), new content (Tax-Loss Harvesting + Cold Storage guides, 738 pages live), worth reading (Fear & Greed Timeline, DCA Calculator, Solana Ecosystem), degen corner: 'Mastercard is building on Solana. Western Union is building on Solana. The Fear & Greed Index says 11. Pick a side.'
Discord/TG evening update: BTC $71,043 holds $71K (+4%), ETH +5%, F&G 11 Day 47, BREAKING: Solana SDP launched with Mastercard/Western Union/Worldpay, CLARITY Act review this week, 738 pages live
Content calendar v23 — 5 tweets + 1 newsletter section + 1 Discord update scheduled Mar 24–27

sections.title: Social Visuals Created
items: SVG card: 'Mastercard. Western Union. Worldpay. Building on Solana.' — 1200x630, dark glass-morphism (#080d1c), purple-green Solana gradient badge (SOLANA DEVELOPER PLATFORM), 3 partner cards (Mastercard → stablecoin settlement, Western Union → cross-border payments, Worldpay → merchant settlement), 4 stat boxes (SOL Stablecoin $15.7B ATH / Monthly TX $650B / 20+ Infra Partners / SEC Commodity status), SDP modules panel + March milestones panel, Solana gradient accents. File: community-drafts/2026-03-24-social-card-solana-sdp-launch.svg

SVG card: '47 Days of Extreme Fear. BTC Holds $71,000.' — 1200x630, dark glass-morphism with red accent, red EXTREME FEAR DAY 47 badge, fear gauge visualization (bar at 11/100 with marker), price panel ($71,043 +4% from support), 3 stat boxes (Spot BTC ETF $1.3B March / Total ETF AUM $128B / Stablecoins $304B ATH), historical pattern signal box (extreme fear + price strength = 15-20% rally within 30 days), red-green divergence accent scheme. File: community-drafts/2026-03-24-social-card-day47-fear-divergence.svg

sections.title: Market Intelligence Used
items: BTC: $71,043 — relief rally +4% from $68,302 support test. Market cap ~$1.33T. BTC dominance ~56.6%. March close in 5 trading days.
ETH: ~$2,200 — outperforming at +5.16% recovery. Still underperforming on relative multi-month basis vs BTC.
F&G: 11 (Extreme Fear) — Day 47 of consecutive Extreme Fear. Longest unbroken streak since post-FTX collapse late 2022. Price divergence from sentiment = historically strongest buy signal.
Spot BTC ETFs: ~$1.3B in March inflows. $128B total AUM across all US spot BTC ETFs. IBIT led with ~$8.4B Q1 inflows. 5-day consecutive inflow streak earlier this month.

SOLANA SDP (BREAKING): Solana Foundation launched Solana Developer Platform on March 24. Mastercard (stablecoin settlement), Western Union (cross-border payments), Worldpay (merchant settlement) as early enterprise users. 2 modules live: issuance + payments. Trading module Q4 2026. Elliptic as compliance partner. 20+ infrastructure partners. AI tools integration (Anthropic Claude Code, OpenAI Codex).

CLARITY Act: Senate Banking Committee reviewing draft language this week. Tillis-Alsobrooks bipartisan deal confirmed Friday: passive yield on stablecoin balances banned, activity-based rewards preserved. Markup targeting late April.
Stablecoins: $304B total supply ATH. SOL stablecoin supply $15.7B ATH. $650B monthly SOL stablecoin tx volume. Projected to exceed $1T by late 2026.
degen0x: 738 total published pages. 2 remaining in queue (Tokenized Treasuries RWA Guide, Funding Rate Tracker). Tax-Loss Harvesting and Cold Storage guides built today and published.
